instruction:
Known$\mathbf{y}=\mathbf{x} / \mathrm{l n x}$ is the solution of differential equation $\mathbf{y}^{\prime}=\mathbf{y} / \mathbf{x}+\varphi\ \ ( \mathbf{x} / \mathbf{y} )$, then $( \mathbf{x} / \mathbf{y} )$ expression for ().

Options:
A. $$- \mathrm{y}^{2} / \mathrm{x}^{2}$$
B. $$- \mathrm{x}^{2} / \mathrm{y}$$
C. $$
\mathbf{y}^{2} / \mathbf{x}^{2}
$$
D. $$\mathrm{y}^{2} / \mathrm{x}^{3}$$
E. $$- \mathrm{x}^{2} / \mathrm{y}^{2}$$
F. $$\mathrm{x}^{2} / \mathrm{y}^{2}$$
G. $$\mathrm{y} / \mathrm{x}^{2}$$
H. $$\mathrm{y}^{3} / \mathrm{x}^{2}$$
I. $$\mathrm{x} / \mathrm{y}^{2}$$
J. $$\mathrm{y} / \mathrm{x}$$
